kpi.prompt: Summe aller offenen Forderungen aus unbezahlten Kundenrechnungen; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN i.payment_status IN ('pending', 'partly_paid', 'loss_of_receivables', 'debited', 'payment_reminder', 'reminder1', 'reminder2', 'reminder3', 'collection')
        THEN COALESCE(i.target_amount, 0) - COALESCE(i.current_amount_paid, 0)
      ELSE 0
    END),
    2
  ) AS "Offene Forderungen"
FROM invoices i
WHERE i.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created', 'unknown')
  AND i.payment_status != 'completed';

en.title: Open receivables
en.description: Sum of all unpaid customer invoices — cash sitting on the customer side.

de.title: Offene Forderungen
de.description: Summe aller unbezahlten Kundenrechnungen — gebundenes Kapital auf der Kundenseite.
